snippet.title: KANCHAN "Ek Adhuro Prem Katha" Pratap Das, Prabisha & Laxmi Ft. Bijay & Gita | New Nepali Song 2077
snippet.description:
Kun Maya Ho Thulo "KANCHAN" Pratap Das, Prabisha Adhikari & Laxmi Khadka | Ft. Bijay Pun & Gita Dhungana | New Nepali Song 2077
Microlink Media Group presenting a real incident based musical story video in association with BP Films Nepal. Featuring Rama Thapaliya, Sher Bahadur DC, Bijay Pun & Gita Dhungana. In this music Video Pratap Das, Prabisha Adhiari & Laxmi Khadka done vocal. Bijay Pun pended the lyrics & composed by Rishi Khadka.

Kun Maya Ho Thulo , Tara ho ki jun ko Dhan ko ho ki  man ko

Master TV Presents:-
Juthe is a social television serial that portrays a story about the Dalits emancipation movement against these oppression, the heroes of the movement and future vision for the emancipation. It is aired in Himalaya Television at 8:00 PM and in YouTube at 9:00 PM every Wednesday.

snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj).

snippet.description:
S3K Entertainments presents the first raute's new music video "Pat Gaser Tapari Man Gasera PiratiвАЭby Kushal Belbase & Sharmila Kandel. Featuring Artists on this video are Satish Adhikari, Sharmila Kandel & Chakra Saud Rc. 
This video is visualized the western part of Nepal (Surkhet) where the Raute community is temporarily located. Raute is a small Sino-Tibetan language of Dadeldhura District, Sudurpashchim Province, Nepal. Raute are a nomadic indigenous ethnic group officially recognized by the Government of Nepal. They are known for subsistence hunting of langur and macaque monkeys. Their population is estimated at about 650, with 618 in Nepal's 2011 census, people living in small settlements in the regions of western Nepal.

ne.description:
S3K Entertainments presents the first raute's new music video "Pat Gaser Tapari Man Gasera PiratiвАЭby Kushal Belbase & Sharmila Kandel. Featuring Artists on this video are Satish Adhikari, Sharmila Kandel & Chakra Saud Rc. 
This video is visualized the western part of Nepal (Surkhet) where the Raute community is temporarily located. Raute is a small Sino-Tibetan language of Dadeldhura District, Sudurpashchim Province, Nepal. Raute are a nomadic indigenous ethnic group officially recognized by the Government of Nepal. They are known for subsistence hunting of langur and macaque monkeys. Their population is estimated at about 650, with 618 in Nepal's 2011 census, people living in small settlements in the regions of western Nepal.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рЯСА


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars

#HerneKatha #ThakurnikoKatha

Story of Manjuliyadevi from Morang in Eastern Nepal, who inherited her husband's profession of traditional barber after his death. 

Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
рЯТБвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТБвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТБвАНвЩВпЄП Become our Patron рЯТБвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТБвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТБвАНвЩВпЄП
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


рЯСАрЯСАрЯСА Herne Katha рЯСАрЯСАрЯСА
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


рЯЪАрЯЪАрЯЪА Herne  Katha Team рЯЪАрЯЪАрЯЪА

рЯОђ Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

рЯС© Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

рЯО• Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

рЯЦ• Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

рЯОЃ Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

рЯУЭ Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

рЯСНрЯПЉ Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

вЬЙпЄП Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

рЯЪН Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


рЯСНрЯСНрЯСН Follow Herne Katha рЯСНрЯСНрЯСН
рЯСЙ IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
рЯСЙ Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
рЯСЙ Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
рЯСЙ Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
рЯСЙ Website: https://hernekatha.com
рЯСЙ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

рЯТМрЯТМрЯТМ Share your Story рЯТМрЯТМрЯТМ 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

рЯТ≤рЯТ≤рЯТ≤ For Advertisers рЯТ≤рЯТ≤рЯТ≤ 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


рЯОґрЯОґрЯОґ For Singers and Musicians рЯОґрЯОґрЯОґ 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


рЯО®рЯО®рЯО® For all Creatives рЯО®рЯО®рЯО®
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


рЯШҐрЯШҐрЯШҐ Sorry рЯШҐрЯШҐрЯШҐ 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


рЯСАрЯСАрЯСА Herne Katha рЯСАрЯСАрЯСА
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on 1st and 15th of every month on YouTube.

If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 


рЯТ≤рЯТ≤рЯТ≤ For Advertisers рЯТ≤рЯТ≤рЯТ≤ 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email. 


рЯУЇрЯУЇрЯУЇ For Broadcasters рЯУЇрЯУЇрЯУЇ
If you represent a radio or TV and want to broadcast Herne Katha on your platform, please write us an email. hello@hernekatha.com 


рЯОґрЯОґрЯОґ For Singers and Musicians рЯОґрЯОґрЯОґ 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


рЯО®рЯО®рЯО® For all Creatives рЯО®рЯО®рЯО®
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.

Master TV Presents:-
Juthe is a social television serial that portrays a story about the Dalits emancipation movement against these oppression, the heroes of the movement and future vision for the emancipation. It is aired in Himalaya Television at 8:00 PM and in YouTube at 9:00 PM every Wednesday.

Actor 
Rabi Giri
Bidhya Karki
Rambabu Regmi
Mukunda Mainali
Sarmila Sharma
Raju Poudel
Marichman Shrestha

Sowinika Bastola

Gokul BC

Mekup Artist

Raju Poudel, Marichman Shrestha

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 28 March 2021 at 9:00 PM

Harke Haldar Team :

Artists : Bishnu Sapkota, Shivahari Bairagi (Nepal), Roshani Sapkota, Surendra K.C., Shiva Sharma, Indra Dong Lama, Saru Dahal, Anita Karki, Anju Rawali, Asmita Basnet, Padam Karki, Rajendra Giri, Yadu Dhital

#Senmikha #HerneKatha

Story of Senmikha, a young shepherd  from Chakhewa, Bhojpur. 

Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
рЯТБвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТБвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТБвАНвЩВпЄП Become our Patron рЯТБвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТБвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТБвАНвЩВпЄП
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


рЯСАрЯСАрЯСА Herne Katha рЯСАрЯСАрЯСА
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


рЯЪАрЯЪАрЯЪА Herne  Katha Team рЯЪАрЯЪАрЯЪА

рЯОђ Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

рЯС© Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

рЯО• Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

рЯЦ• Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

рЯОЃ Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

рЯУЭ  Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

рЯСНрЯПЉ Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

вЬЙпЄП Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

рЯЪН Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


рЯСНрЯСНрЯСН Follow Herne Katha рЯСНрЯСНрЯСН
рЯСЙ IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/

рЯСЙ Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
рЯСЙ Website: https://hernekatha.com
рЯСЙ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

рЯТМрЯТМрЯТМ Share your Story рЯТМрЯТМрЯТМ 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

рЯТ≤рЯТ≤рЯТ≤ For Advertisers рЯТ≤рЯТ≤рЯТ≤ 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


рЯОґрЯОґрЯОґ For Singers and Musicians рЯОґрЯОґрЯОґ 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


рЯО®рЯО®рЯО® For all Creatives рЯО®рЯО®рЯО®
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


рЯШҐрЯШҐрЯШҐ Sorry рЯШҐрЯШҐрЯШҐ 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: Best Of CID | а§Єа•Аа§Жа§Иа§°а•А | Clustrophobia | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Watch More CID Episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G0MM1QMSnGwbCTP8aU6oTz7
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A judge who happens to be ACP PradyumanвАЩs childhood friend, gets the shock of his life when he comes to know about his grandsonвАЩs kidnapping. The kidnappers want a judgment in their favour in return for the grandson. The judge refuses to comply but has very little time save his grandson. Will he crack and do what the criminals say in an attempt to save his grandson? 

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

More Useful Links :

* Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV

snippet.description:

Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

а§Ђа•За§ѓа§∞а•А а§Яа•За§≤а•На§Є а§Ъа•Иа§®а§≤ а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа•Ла§В а§Ха•З а§≤а§ња§П а§¶а§ња§≤а§Ъа§Єа•На§™ а§™а§∞а•А а§Ха§•а§Њ а§Ха§єа§Ња§®а§ња§ѓа§Ња§В а§™а•На§∞а§¶а§Ња§® а§Ха§∞а§§а§Њ а§єа•И а§Ьа•Л а§∞а§Ъа§®а§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Х а§Фа§∞ а§∞а§Ва§Ча•Аа§® а§§а§∞а•Аа§Ха•З а§Єа•З а§¶а§ња§Ца§Ња§И а§Ьа§Ња§§а•А  а§єа•Иа§Ва•§ а§За§Єа§Ха•З а§Еа§≤а§Ња§µа§Њ, а§За§® а§Єа§ђ а§Ѓа•За§В а§ґа•Иа§Ха•На§Ја§ња§Х а§ђа§Ња§§а•За§В а§≠а•А а§ґа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤ а§єа•Иа§В а§Ьа§ња§Єа§Ха§Њ а§Йа§¶а•На§¶а•За§ґа•На§ѓ а§Жа§™а§Ха•З а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа•Ла§В а§Ха•Л а§Єа•На§µа§Ња§≠а§Ња§µа§ња§Х а§∞а•Ва§™ а§Єа•З а§Фа§∞ а§Іа•Аа§∞а•З а§Єа•З а§ґа§ња§Ха•На§Ја§ња§§ а§Ха§∞а§®а§Њ а§єа•Иа•§ а§єа§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•А а§Єа•Ва§Ъа§њ а§Ха•Л а§За§® а§ґа•На§∞а•За§£а§ња§ѓа•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§µа§ња§≠а§Ња§Ьа§ња§§ а§Ха§ња§ѓа§Њ а§Ча§ѓа§Њ а§єа•И: а§Ха§≤а•На§™а§ња§§, а§≤а•Ла§Ха§Ха§•а§Њ, а§Ьа§Ња§¶а•Ба§И, а§™а•Ма§∞а§Ња§£а§ња§Х, а§Ха§ња§Ва§µа§¶а§Ва§§а•А а§Фа§∞ а§Ха§•а§Ња§Па§В а§Ьа•Л а§єа§∞ а§µа§ња§ґа§ња§Ја•На§Я а§™а•На§≤а•За§≤а§ња§Єа•На§Я а§Ѓа•За§В а§™а§Ња§И а§Ьа§Њ а§Єа§Ха§§а•А а§єа•Иа§Ва•§ а§Жа§ґа§Њ а§єа•И а§Ха§њ а§Жа§™ а§Єа§≠а•А а§єа§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•З а§Ъа•Иа§®а§≤ а§Ха§Њ а§Жа§®а§Ва§¶ а§≤а•За§Ва§Ча•З а§Фа§∞ а§®а§П а§Еа§™а§≤а•Ла§° а§Ха§ња§П а§Ча§П а§µа•Аа§°а§ња§ѓа•Л а§Ха•А а§Єа•Ва§Ъа§®а§Њ а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§™а•На§§ а§Ха§∞а§®а•З а§Ха•З а§≤а§ња§П а§Ха•Га§™а§ѓа§Њ а§Єа§ђа•На§Єа§Ха•На§∞а§Ња§За§ђ а§Ха§∞а•За§В а•§

вЦЇ WOA а§Ђа•За§ѓа§∞а•А а§Яа•За§≤а•На§Є - а§єа§ња§Ва§¶а•А а§Фа§∞ а§За§Єа§Ха•З а§Єа§≠а•А а§µа•Аа§°а§ња§ѓа•Л а§ґа•Аа§∞а•На§Ја§Х 16 C.F.R а§Ха•З а§Еа§∞а•На§• а§Ѓа•За§В "а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа•Ла§В а§Ха•Л а§®а§ња§∞а•На§¶а•За§ґа§ња§§ а§®а§єа•Аа§В" а§єа•Иа§Ва•§ ¬І312.2 а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа•Ла§В а§Ха•А а§Са§®а§≤а§Ња§За§® а§Ча•Ла§™а§®а•Аа§ѓа§§а§Њ а§Єа•Ба§∞а§Ха•На§Ја§Њ а§Еа§Іа§ња§®а§ња§ѓа§Ѓ (а§ѓа•Ва§Па§Єа§П) 13 а§µа§∞а•На§Ј а§Єа•З а§Ха§Ѓ а§Йа§Ѓа•На§∞ а§Ха•З а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа•Ла§В а§Ха•З а§≤а§ња§П а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§єа•Иа•§ WOA а§Ђа•За§ѓа§∞а•А а§Яа•За§≤а•На§Є - а§єа§ња§Ва§¶а•А а§Фа§∞ а§Йа§Єа§Ха•З а§Ѓа§Ња§≤а§ња§Х (а§Уа§В), а§Па§Ьа•За§Ва§Яа•Ла§В, а§™а•На§∞а§§а§ња§®а§ња§Іа§ња§ѓа•Ла§В, а§Фа§∞ а§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа§Ъа§Ња§∞а§ња§ѓа•Ла§В а§®а•З 13 а§µа§∞а•На§Ј а§Єа•З а§Ха§Ѓ а§Йа§Ѓа•На§∞ а§Ха•З а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа•Ла§В а§Єа•З а§Ха•Ла§И а§Ьа§Ња§®а§Ха§Ња§∞а•А а§Па§Ха§§а•На§∞ а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§Ха•А а§Фа§∞ 13 а§µа§∞а•На§Ј а§Єа•З а§Ха§Ѓ а§Йа§Ѓа•На§∞ а§Ха•З а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа•Ла§В а§Єа•З а§Ьа§Ња§®а§Ха§Ња§∞а•А а§Па§Ха§§а•На§∞ а§Ха§∞а§®а•З а§Ха•З а§≤а§ња§П а§Ха§ња§Єа•А а§≠а•А а§§а•Аа§Єа§∞а•З а§™а§Ха•На§Ј а§Ха•Л а§Єа•На§™а§Ја•На§Я а§∞а•Ва§™ а§Єа•З а§Еа§®а•Ба§Ѓа§§а§њ а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§¶а•Аа•§ WOA а§Ђа•За§ѓа§∞а•А а§Яа•За§≤а•На§Є а§Ха•А а§Уа§∞ а§Єа•З - а§єа§ња§Ва§¶а•Аа•§ а§За§Єа§Ха•З а§Еа§≤а§Ња§µа§Њ, WOA а§Ђа•За§ѓа§∞а•А а§Яа•За§≤а•На§Є - а§єа§ња§Ва§¶а•А, YouTube а§Фа§∞ а§За§Єа§Ха•З а§Па§Ьа•За§Ва§Яа•Ла§В а§Фа§∞ а§Єа§єа§Ња§ѓа§Х а§Ха§Ва§™а§®а§ња§ѓа•Ла§В, а§ѓа§Њ а§Ха§ња§Єа•А а§≠а•А а§Еа§®а•На§ѓ а§Єа§Ва§ђа§¶а•На§І а§§а•Аа§Єа§∞а•З а§™а§Ха•На§Ј а§Ха•А а§™а•На§∞а§•а§Ња§Уа§В а§Фа§∞ а§®а•Аа§§а§ња§ѓа•Ла§В, а§°а•За§Яа§Њ а§Єа§Ва§Ча•На§∞а§є а§Ха•З а§ђа§Ња§∞а•З а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ха§ња§Єа•А а§≠а•А а§Фа§∞ а§Єа§≠а•А а§¶а§Ња§ѓа§ња§§а•На§µ а§ѓа§Њ а§Ьа§ња§Ѓа•На§Ѓа•За§¶а§Ња§∞а•А а§Єа•З а§За§®а§Ха§Ња§∞ а§Ха§∞а§§а§Њ а§єа•Иа•§       а§За§Є а§Ъа•Иа§®а§≤ а§Ѓа•За§В а§Єа§≠а•А а§Са§°а§ња§ѓа•Л а§Фа§∞ а§µа§ња§Ьа§Ља•Ба§Еа§≤ а§Ха§Ва§Яа•За§Ва§Я SCONNECT CO, LTD, audiojungle.net а§Ха•З а§Єа•На§µа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§§а•На§µ а§Ѓа•За§В а§єа•Иа§В а§Фа§∞ а§Ха•На§∞а§ња§Па§Яа§ња§µ а§Ха•Йа§Ѓа§®а•На§Є а§∞а§ња§µа§ња§Ьа§Ља§® а§Ха•З а§§а§єа§§ а§≤а§Ња§За§Єа•За§Ва§Є а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§™а•На§§ а§єа•Иа§Ва•§

snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Marjaneya by Neha Kakkar ft. Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik.

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/marjaneya-1

Singer - Neha Kakkar
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Babbu
Music arranged & produced by Rajat Nagpal 
Guitars Shomu Seal 
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap

Featuring - Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Co-Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar 
Assistant Choreographer- Robin Singh
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
VFX - Prathmesh ChaukekarвАЛ ,Prathmesh Sampada Parab 
Art Director - Karma Art Studio 
Jimmy Jib - Manish Arora
Production - Fateh Film Production
Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik Stylist - Ashna Makhijani Shah
Neha's team:
Styled by - Outro  By Akshita & Anulika
Make-up - Ritika Vats
Hair by - Rita Shukla
Photo by - Piyush Mehra
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.title: Holi Mein Rangeele (DJ Shadow Remix) | Video Song | Mouni R | Varun S | Sunny S | Mika S | Abhinav S
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents official full video of Holi Mein Rangeele Remixed by DJ Shadow. In Remo D'Souza's Direction Mouni Roy, Varun Sharma, Sunny Singh along with Super Energetic Abhinav Shekhar create magic, one move at a time in the Holi celebratory song Jogira Sara Ra Ra #HoliMeinRangeele Sung by Mika Singh and Abhinav Shekhar. The lyrics are penned by Abhinav Shekhar and the music is directed by Aditya Dev. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.


Producer: Varsha Kukreja
Created by: MK
Director: Remo D'Souza

snippet.description:
Register with Coinswitch Kuber and get FREE Bitcoin worth Rs.50 - https://coinswitch.co/in/refer?tag=eDq4 

Hello friends, did you know? Mars is habitable? Scientists in NASA and other space agencies believe that man can reach Mars and live on Mars by 2033. Whereas recently Tesla tycoon Elon Musk believes that he can make this possible just in a span of the next 4-5 years! And if you check Elon Musk twitter account, he has been really passionate about cryptocurrencies such as bitcoins I mean can you believe it? And the main question is can humans survive living on Mars? Well, Phoenix Mars lander has confirmed that Mars has water in its space exploration. But is water the only thing that will make humans survive? No, right? But you'll be shocked to know that Mars has its own atmosphere too!

So what do you think? Can humans habitat Mars by 2026?? Stay tuned to know more!

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || а§Ѓа•За§∞а•А а§ђа§Ња§Єа•На§Єа•И || Holi Special || Ep.-695 ||March-23-2021|| Peter Khaling || Media Hub
snippet.description:
Everyone is looking to have some fun and enjoy the festival of colors Holi. Bokre has some special guests, watch their interactions with the people in the village on today's episode

Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta
Sub-Editor: Ashok Chaudhary
Graphics: Rajendra Manandhar
Script Writer: Kunjan Bhattarai
Camera: Rahul Rai
Makeup: Nirmala Acharya
Title song Writer: Shankar Adhikari 
Music/Singer: Chetan Sapkota 
Guest Artist: Peter Khaling, Sheshuka Rai
Artists: Surbir Pandit, Ramchandra Adhikari, Daman Rupakheti,  Surendra K.C, Palpasa Dangol, Suraj Chapagain, Januka Poudel, Niru Khadka, Tika bhakta Jirel, Ratna Prajapati, Lekhant Bhusal(Lekharaj), Diwakar Bhandari, Madhu Acharya, Krishna Joshi, Dhanaram Muskan, Sarswoti Fuyal, Dharma Prasad Bhattarai and many more.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || а§Ѓа•За§∞а•А а§ђа§Ња§Єа•На§Єа•И || Ep.-696 || March-30-2021|| Volleyball Special || By Media Hub
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta
Sub-Editor: Ashok Chaudhary
Graphics: Rajendra Manandhar
Script Writer: Kunjan Bhattarai
Camera: Rahul Rai
Makeup: Nirmala Acharya
Title song Writer: Shankar Adhikari 
Music/Singer: Chetan Sapkota 
Artists: Laxmi Giri, Surbir Pandit, Ramchandra Adhikari, Daman Rupakheti,  Surendra K.C, Palpasa Dangol, Suraj Chapagain, Januka Poudel, Niru Khadka, Tika bhakta Jirel, Ratna Prajapati, Lekhant Bhusal(Lekharaj), Diwakar Bhandari, Madhu Acharya, Krishna Joshi, Dhanaram Muskan, Sarswoti Fuyal, Dharma Prasad Bhattarai and many more.

Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: The Stolen Necklace | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.title: The Big Bull: Official Trailer | Abhishek B, Ileana D, Nikita D, Sohum S | Kookie Gulati | 8th April
snippet.description:
This was not just another scam... it was the mother of all scams! Presenting the official trailer of #TheBigBull, starring Abhishek. A. Bachchan, Ileana D'Cruz, Nikita Dutta, Soham Shah, Ram Kapoor, Supriya Pathak, Saurabh Shukla and Mahesh Manjrekar in a special appearance. The film is set to releasing on 8th April 2021.

Produced by: Ajay Devgn & Anand Pandit

snippet.title: Comedy Champion Season 2 - Episode 06
snippet.description:
Comedy Champion Season 2  Grand Premiere Episode 06

a super successful Season 1, we are back to sweep you off your feet and make your stomachs ache. Comedy Champion Season 2! 

The judges for the show are Legendary Artist Santosh Pant, Popular Stand-Up Comedian Manoj Gajurel, Celebrated Director Pradip Bhattarai, and Talented Actress Reecha Sharma hosted by Prominent VJ Rima Bishwokarma.  

ItвАЩs a Three Production Presentation.

snippet.title: Coronavirus Update: а§Ха•На§ѓа§Њ а§¶а•За§ґ а§Ѓа•За§В а§Па§Х а§ђа§Ња§∞ а§Ђа§ња§∞ а§≤а•Ма§Яа•За§Ча§Њ Lockdown? | Latest News | Hindi News
snippet.description:
In 24 hours, there have been 40,953 new coronavirus cases have been recorded in the country,188 people have died, and 23,653 people have been cured. snippet.title: Barrister Babu | а§ђа•Иа§∞а§ња§Єа•На§Яа§∞ а§ђа§Ња§ђа•В | Episode 230 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Bondita's wicked plan to trouble Manorama works and she stumbles upon a shocking revelation about Anirudh and Manorama's marriage. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more.
#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV

But as our trio settle into this new phase, they realise theyвАЩll have to dig deeper than they expected, especially with one particular case of coronavirus taking a personal toll on all their lives later on!

hi.title: Dice Media | Operation MBBS | Season 2 | Web Series | Episode 1 - Honeymoon Period
hi.description:
The second year of MBBS is known to medical students as the honeymoon period before things begin to get really tough рЯУЪ
But as our trio settle into this new phase, they realise theyвАЩll have to dig deeper than they expected, especially with one particular case of coronavirus taking a personal toll on all their lives later on! 

Unacademy presents Operation MBBS 2.
#DiceOperationMBBS2 #AyushMehra #AnshulChauhan #SarahHashmi

With Unacademy, you too can get guidance from IndiaвАЩs Top Educators, build a strong foundation and crack NEET-UG with ease. 
Download the Unacademy Learning App here: https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/67950194
With comprehensive and curated Batch Courses for more than 40 Exam Categories, Unacademy is IndiaвАЩs largest learning platform. Use code MBBS10 to get 10% off on your NEET UG subscription. #LetsCrackIt

snippet.title: Master Ji Ka Bhoot - Amit Bhadana
snippet.description:
Do badmash students ne kar rakha hai apne master ji ki naak mein dum aur is duniya mein nahi hai unka koi bhi ilaaj. Par kya karenge vo dono jab master ji dosari duniya se mangne ayenge jawaab? Is kahani mein hum aapko parlok ki sair karayenge, thoda sa darr lagega par bahut sara hansayenge. Masterji ki class mein attendance lagao aur bakiyon ko bhi le kar aao.
